title: hedyotis tuberosa
intro: Hedyotis tuberosa, also known as Indian pink or Butterfly flower, is a flowering plant native to Asia, particularly in India and China. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hedyotis tuberosa include treating fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as improving digestion and reducing stress. Hedyotis tuberosa can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion for herbal remedies, and it is also used in various traditional formulations.
